titleStmt.title: SII 38.109: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 109. (A.R. No. 109 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the west wall, central shrine, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Tribhuvanachakravartti Śri Rājarājadēva Year 8: 1224 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription states that an individual, Maruṅkūruḍaiyān Tiruvāṇḍān Chandrasēkaran alias Aḻagiya Jñanasambandan, a native of Paruvūr in Dāmarkōṭṭam in Jayaṅkoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam, made a gift of 12 aṉrāḍu-naṟpaḻaṅkāśu in order to defray the expenses for conducting the procession of Āḷuḍaiyār Kārāṇaiviṭaṅkadēvar around the temple, to provide for his bath and supply various food offerings on the occasion of the asterism (tiruvādirai) day in the Mārgaḻi month. The ūrār of Igaṇaiyūr, a dēvadāna village of the above temple received the gifted amount and agreed to supply various items required for the said food offerings of the temple kitchen, out of the interest accrued from the amount every year.
The members of the ūr assembly such as Amudāṅkiḻavan uraṉ Maṟṟān, Amudāṅkiḻavan Āmantirāyan, and others figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tribhuvanaccakravat
tikaḷ śrīrājarājatevaṟku yāṇṭu
8vatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu U
ṭaiyār tiruvoṟṟiyūr Uṭaiya nāyaṉār
koyilil Āḷuṭaiyār kārāṇaiviṭaṅkade
var tirumārkaḻit tiruvātiraināḷ vimāṉa
pradakṣaṇamāka Eḻuntaruḷit tirumañcana
m paṇṇi Amutu ceytaruḷa Immaṇ
ṭalattu tāmaṟkoṭṭattup paruvūr maruṅ
kūruṭaiyān tiruvāṇṭān candracekara
ṉāṉa Aḻakiya ñāṉa campantar pakkal Iṉṉāyaṉār tevatāṉam Ika
ṇaiyūr Ūravarom poliyūṭṭāka kaikkoṇṭa Aṉṟāṭu naṟ
ppaḻaṅkācu 10 2 Ippaḻaṅkācu paṉṉiraṇṭum kaikko
ṇṭu Iṟṟai nāḷ Amutu ceytaruḷat tirumaṭaippaḷḷip paṇ
ṭārattuk koyiṟ kālāl Aḷakkum kuttalarici Iru kalamu
m paruppu Amutu kuṟuṇiyum palavaṟkattuk kaṟi Amutu niṟai
nāṉūṟṟup palamum vāḻaippaḻam Aimpatum teṅkāy pat
tum miḷaku Amutu Uriyum neyyamutu nāḻi Uriyun tayiramutu ku
ṟuṇiyum karuppukkaṭṭi nāḻiyum Uppamutu Iru nāḻiyum A
ṭaikkāy Amutu pākku Irupatum Ilaiamutu paṟṟu Araiyum veṇṭu
m kucakkalamum viṟakum Ippaḻakkācu paṉṉiraṇṭukkum poliyūṭṭāka I
vvāṇṭu mutal Āṇṭu toṟum tirumaṭaippaḷḷip paṇṭārattile Ivaru
kkāka Ippaṭi kuṟaivaṟuttu Amutu ceyvikka kaṭavomāka Ippaṭi cantrātitta
varai celutta kaṭavomākavum tirumalaiyile cilālekai paṇṇikku
ṭuttom Ikaṇaiyūr Ūravarom Ippaṭikku Ivai Amutāṅkiḻavaṉ
Uraṉ maṟṟān Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Amutāṅkiḻavan Āmantirāyan Eḻuttu I
ppaṭikku Ivai Amutāṅkiḻavan Ūraṉ maṟṟāṉ tennavarāyan Eḻuttu Ippaṭi
kku Ivai Amutāṅkiḻavan Ākamac celvan Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 38.109 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
